title: Polymath DACI Decision frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of a docs/decisions/<slug>.md DACI artifact authored by polymath-decisions:daci. Encodes the DACI invariants the skill enforces in prose: exactly one Approver, Approver ≠ Driver, a real due date (no 'TBD'), status enum.

driver.description: The single person responsible for moving the decision to closure.

approver.description: The single person empowered to approve. Must differ from `driver`; the skill enforces this and validators MAY cross-check string equality.

contributors.description: Optional list of contributors providing input.

informed.description: Optional list of people informed after the decision.

due.description: Concrete due date in ISO-8601. 'TBD' / 'soon' MUST be rejected — the DACI skill insists on a real date.

decided_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp the decision was recorded. Required when status transitions to `decided`.

adr_link.description: Optional path / URL to an ADR that records the decision's architectural framing.
